name: Naruto RPG - AU
description:
PLEASE READ:

The new Naruto RPG bot is up! Go through my profile to find it and let me know what you think!

A Naruto RPG set in a different universe than the canon one! Key changes include: Uchiha Clan Survival, Hyuga Clan Massacre, Minato as the surviving Hokage, new Akatsuki, and balances given to the other villages.
creator: LordAquos
